scripts.db:migrate: docker run --rm --network lms_kominfo_default -e "DATABASE_URL=postgresql://lms:lms_dev@lms-postgres:5432/lms_dev?schema=public" -v "%CD%\packages\database:/app" -w /app node:20 npx prisma@5.22.0 migrate dev --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:deploy: docker run --rm --network lms_kominfo_default -e "DATABASE_URL=postgresql://lms:lms_dev@lms-postgres:5432/lms_dev?schema=public" -v "%CD%\packages\database:/app" -w /app node:20 npx prisma@5.22.0 migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:push: docker run --rm --network lms_kominfo_default -e "DATABASE_URL=postgresql://lms:lms_dev@lms-postgres:5432/lms_dev?schema=public" -v "%CD%\packages\database:/app" -w /app node:20 npx prisma@5.22.0 db push --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.docker:dev: docker compose --profile dev up api web
scripts.docker:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
